1: How long wilt thou hide thy face from me?
2: How long shall mine enemy be exalted over me?
3: Lighten mine eyes, lest I sleep the sleep of sleep of death;
4: And And those that trouble me rejoice when I am moved.
5: My heart shall rejoice in thy salvation.
6: I will sing unto the LORD LORD , because he hath dealt bountifully with me.
